global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with a central focus on the BiteRush brand and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a special discount.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Two empty frames
elements.description: Two rectangular frames are centered, outlined in a subtle color, suggesting a placeholder for images or products.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unidentified element that is centered and occupies a small area, details not discernible.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text reads 'Your cravings, delivered' with a smaller line below it stating 'Fresh favorites nearby'.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The logo 'BiteRush' is displayed in a prominent position at the top, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button at the bottom reads 'Get offer' in bold text, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small badge at the bottom left displays '-30%' in bold text, indicating a discount.

elements.label: Sale icon
elements.description: A small 'SALE' tag is positioned at the top right corner, featuring a contrasting color to attract attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and inviting, BiteRush, food delivery, discount
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your cravings, delivered, Fresh favorites nearby, BiteRush, Get offer, 30%, SALE
